ddls:
CREATE TABLE "files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each file */,
  "file_name" TEXT /* Name of the file */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the file (e.g., contract, library) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Programming language of the file (e.g., Solidity, JavaScript) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Full path of the file */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Module or library the file belongs to */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last modification date of the file */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the file was first added to the system */,
  "size_bytes" INTEGER /* Size of the file in bytes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, QA engineer, project manager) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "file_id" INTEGER /* ID of the file being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the file */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the file was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "details" TEXT /* Additional details about the access event (e.g., IP address, user agent) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_file_id FOREIGN KEY ("file_id") REFERENCES files ("file_id")
)
